name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Data Compressed - PowerShell
notes:
This Building Block compressed data that is collected prior to exfiltration.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Data Compressed - PowerShell
SIGMA Description: An adversary may compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Data Compressed - PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-recurse%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%|%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%compress-archive%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Data Compressed - PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-recurse%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%|%' and LOWER("Command") LIKE '%compress-archive%' AQL filter query
